text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Medication Therapy Management Enrollment │ May 2024│ V 1.3 21 

LTC_ENROLLMENT 

LABEL: Long-term care (LTC) facility resident 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates if the beneficiary was a long-term care (LTC) facility resident 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: Y = Yes 
N = No 
U = Unknown 

COMMENT: This field is available only in 2013. 

CMS created the MTM file from information
